name: PER_GRADE_LADDERS_F
description: PER_GRADE_LADDERS_F stores the grade ladder details. A Grade Ladder is a hierarchy of Grades and is used to provide the ability to define rates for the Grades or the Steps.

columns.Name: GRADE_LADDER_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: GRADE_SET_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the grade set.

columns.Name: GRADE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the grade, for example with steps.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates if a grade ladder is active or inactive.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUTO_PROGRESSION_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if workers on this ladder will be automatically progressed or if progression needs manual approval.

columns.Name: PROGRESSION_STYLE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if this ladder allows 'Grade' or 'Grade and Step'.

columns.Name: STEP_DETERMINATION_CODE
columns.Comments: If Progression Style is Grade and Step, on reaching the highest step in grade or ceiling step, this column determines how the starting step in new grade needs to be determined.

columns.Name: PROGRESSION_DATE_CODE
columns.Comments: Create new lookup_type CMP_GSP_PROG_DT.

columns.Name: PROG_ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Progression Action Occurrence.

columns.Name: PROG_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Progression Action.

columns.Name: PROG_ACTION_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Progression Action Reason.

columns.Name: UPDATE_SALARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if salary is updated along with grade or step change.

columns.Name: AUTO_SAL_CHANGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if salary change as a result of grade/step change is updated automatically or needs manual approval.

columns.Name: SALARY_CHANGE_DATE_CODE
columns.Comments: Date on which the new salary amount takes effect.

columns.Name: SALARY_CALC_METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Used to determine the new salary rate.

columns.Name: SALARY_CALC_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Fast formula to calculate salary rate.

columns.Name: SALARY_UPD_METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the salary change will be written on the salary record or using a different payroll element.

columns.Name: SALARY_ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll element in which the workers new grade or step rate is written.

columns.Name: SALARY_INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll element in which the workers new grade or step rate is written.

columns.Name: SALARY_ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Salary Action Occurrence.

columns.Name: SALARY_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Salary Action.

columns.Name: SALARY_ACTION_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Salary Action Reason.

columns.Name: RATE_CHANGE_DATE_CODE
columns.Comments: Used by Rate Sync process to determine as of which date the new rate is applied.

columns.Name: ALLOW_PROG_OVERRIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: don

columns.Name: ALLOW_SALARY_OVERRIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the salary amount written by progression process can be overidden by Admin on the salary UI.

columns.Name: PROGRESSION_DATE_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Fast formula to calculate progression date. Value in this column makes sense only if progression_date_code = ' ORA_CMP_GSP_DATE_RULE'

columns.Name: SALARY_CHANGE_DATE_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Fast formula to calculate salary change date. Value in this column makes sense only if salary_change_date_code = ' ORA_CMP_GSP_DATE_RULE'

columns.Name: RATE_CHANGE_DATE_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Fast formula to calculate rate change date. Value in this column makes sense only if rate_change_date_code = ' ORA_CMP_GSP_DATE_RULE'

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Legislative Data Group

columns.Name: GRADE_LADDER_GRP_CODE
columns.Comments: To combine grade ladders into groups for processing.

columns.Name: SALARY_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Determines how  the salary from the ladder is adjusted.

columns.Name: RATE_SYNC_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the action used for the salary record indicating why the salary was updated by the rate synchronization process.

columns.Name: RATE_SYNC_ACTION_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: The code of the optional reason used for the salary record indicating why the record was updated by the rate synchronization process.
